description: SAIPA Group (Société Anonyme Iranienne de Production Automobile) is an Iranian state-owned automotive manufacturer and one of Iran's two largest automakers alongside Iran Khodro. Founded in 1966, it produces passenger cars, light commercial vehicles, and minibuses, primarily for the domestic market. [Mehrdad Bazrpash](/people/mehrdad-bazrpash) served as CEO of SAIPA before his appointment as Minister of Roads and Urban Development in 2022.

sources.title: Mehrdad Bazrpash Named Iran's Minister Of Roads — Iran Front Page

editorial_notes: State-owned. One of Iran's two main automakers (alongside Iran Khodro). Bazrpash was CEO before ministerial appointment. Also owns Pars Khodro subsidiary.
